message: Shadow configuration guidance is for comparison and verification only. It does not alter the selected operational TAF guidance.

config.label: Control current
config.description: Frozen replay baseline: 40% wet-model probability, no minimum agreement gate, and a two-hour rain bridge. This is a comparison baseline, not a claim that it exactly matches live event adaptation.
config.event_calibration: preserved except for this configuration's explicit rain/TS overrides

guidance.narration: Secara umum cuaca berawan sebagian dengan jarak pandang baik. Angin dominan bertiup dengan kecepatan ringan hingga sedang (6 KT).
warnings: Rain/TS confidence adjusted with event-window skill from UKMO_GLOBAL_10KM, METEOFRANCE_ARPEGE_WORLD, GEM_GLOBAL (strength 0.77).
Gust groups allowed by event-window skill from ECMWF_HRES, CMA_GRAPES_GLOBAL, METEOFRANCE_ARPEGE_WORLD (strength 0.07).

Rainfall.reason: event-window skill blended into event-sensitive weights

Wind Gust.reason: event-window skill blended into event-sensitive weights

provenance.event_calibration: preserved except for this configuration's explicit rain/TS overrides

config.label: Rain 50/20
config.description: Balanced candidate: require 50% weighted wet-model probability and 20% spread-adjusted agreement; disable rain-gap bridging.
config.event_calibration: preserved except for this configuration's explicit rain/TS overrides

config.label: Rain 50/20 with BECMG guard
config.description: Rain 50/20 plus BECMG wording only after three rainy hours and 25% spread-adjusted agreement; weaker events remain temporary or probability wording.
config.event_calibration: preserved except for this configuration's explicit rain/TS overrides
